name: The Rabbit Prince
description:
Suit Key (Dex)

Alignment chaotic neutral

The Rabbit Prince represents the unreliability of hand-to-hand combat, and how even cunning foes can lose to lucky novices. As long as you have The Rabbit Prince invested, it grants you a +1 status bonus to attack rolls you make as a readied action.

Activate r (fortune) envision

Trigger You miss a creature with a melee weapon Strike

Frequency once per day

Effect Reroll the triggering Strike with a +1 status bonus. If you hit, attempt a ; on a failure, your weapon gains the broken condition (if your weapon is already broken, it's destroyed). If you're at least 14th level, this flat check is . If you're at least 17th level, this flat check is .
